Input features: fixed target-centered graph profiles for components, unordered component pairs, and ADRs; plus a formula-level auxiliary vector
Dose handling: primary model ZEROES BOTH the formula-level auxiliary dose vector (6-dim) AND the pair-level dose-derived channels; dose channels are present in the architecture but zero-filled
Component feature dim: 54 (= 48 target-profile + 3 graph-derived + 3 dose-derived; the 3 dose channels are zero-filled in the primary model -> 51 informative)
Pair feature dim: 15 (= 11 graph-derived interaction features + 1 dose-product + 3 dose-derived; all 4 dose channels are zero-filled in the primary model -> 11 informative)
Evaluation setting: leakage-controlled tested-universe; 10-fold pair-stratified CV x 3 outer seeds = 30 folds; negative ratio 10; AUROC-based early stopping
Notes: ADR-conditioned attention over components and component pairs

Dose handling: dose-derived columns as provided in the feature table
Evaluation setting: leakage-controlled tested-universe; 10-fold pair-stratified CV x 3 outer seeds = 30 folds; negative ratio 10; AUROC-based early stopping
